items.title: ‘Epic Seven’ “Secret Summer” Update Live—New Limited Hero, Story, “Epic Dash” Event
items.summary: This week, developer Super Creative and publisher Smilegate have launched their latest summer update to their free-to-play turn-based role-playing game
items.content:
This week, developer Super Creative and publisher Smilegate have launched their latest summer update to their free-to-play turn-based role-playing game title ‘Epic Seven’ across PC and mobile platforms. This seasonal update includes a new Limited Hero, a Special Side Story, and the latest “Epic Dash” event. A special summer coupon code, “E7SUMMERGIFT26”, is also available for redemption until 26 August—you can redeem it in-game or by clicking over here .

The Limited Hero introduced for the 2026 summer season is Eye of the Abyss Fumyr. As a central figure in the newly added Special Side Story, “Show Me What Lies Within,” she visits the Aelo Coast to track the whereabouts of Harsetti, the sovran of Shadow Elves, only to find herself swept up in a series of unexpected incidents.

Eye of the Abyss Fumyr is a 5★ Earth Elemental Mage obtainable until July 16. Her Skill 3, “Eye of the Abyss,” inflicts “Detain” on the foremost enemy Hero, temporarily removing them from the battlefield. This allows players to collapse the enemy’s frontline and drive the battle to their advantage.

Story starring Fumyr will run for six weeks until 6 August. Set against a coastal backdrop, the narrative features a diverse cast of characters alongside Fumyr, including the information broker “Birgitta” and her assistant “Aube.” Notably, as players progress through the story, they can play a classic “territory-capture” style arcade mini game to acquire various rewards, including high-quality illustrations.

Meanwhile, the “Epic Dash” event will take place from June 25 to August 27, offering massive benefits for Hero acquisition and growth. Players can clear daily and weekly missions to level up their “Mission Pass” rank and claim rewards. Depending on their rank, players can obtain a 5★ Hero Selector that provides a Hero with all progression fully completed, a 5★ Limited Hero Selector, a standard 5★ Hero Selector, various Summon Currencies, Equipment Sets, and more.

Also, as part of the Epic Dash lineup, the “Premium Moonlight Summon” event will grant players up to 100 free Moonlight Hero summons simply by logging in daily. As an extra milestone bonus, players will receive a 5★ Light Elemental Hero Summon Ticket upon performing 20 summons, and a 5★ Dark Elemental Hero Summon Ticket upon performing 100 summons. Finally, the update brings the “Lucky Dash” event, where players can obtain various Equipment and Charms, alongside the “Epic Dash Buff” event, which provides several powerful in-game buffs.

The developer has also prepared a set of “Secret Summer Digital Merchandise” featuring wallpapers of some of Epic Seven’s heroines. You can download the images from the game’s official website (bottom of the page) to grab copies tailor-made for your PC, mobile, tablet, and watch.

Epic Seven is available as a free-to-play title across PC via STOVE , iOS , and Android via Google Play .

Enjoying DayOne ? Do us a favour, and make us a ‘ Preferred Source on Google ‘ – that way, you’ll only be delivered more gaming coverage from our team.

Head over and let us know your thoughts in the Day O ne Forums , the perfect place to chat about games if you’re a little more old-school and prefer things in a longform format.

Prefer the chaos of live and fast moving conversation? Come and make some noise in the lively DayOne Community Discord Server instead. If you’re rocking a DayOne Membership, both places give special access for our supporters, and you’ll unlock a ton of exclusive content, just for you.

items.title: Epic Seven Launches Summer Update with New Limited Hero 'Fumir'
items.summary: Source: Smilegate©INVENSmilegate announced on the 26th that it has launched the summer season update for its mobile turn-based strategy RPG 'Epic Seven.' This update includes ...
items.content:
Smilegate announced on the 26th that it has launched the summer season update for its mobile turn-based strategy RPG 'Epic Seven.' This update includes the new limited hero 'Abyssal Eye Fumir,' a special side story, and the 'Epic Dash' event.

The limited hero for summer 2026 is 'Abyssal Eye Fumir.' As a key figure in the special side story 'Show Me Even the Hidden Depths,' Fumir visits the 'Ailo Coast' to track the movements of the Shadow Elf King 'Harsetti,' where she encounters various incidents.

'Abyssal Eye Fumir' is a 5-star Earth-element Sorcerer hero available only until July 16. Her 3rd skill, 'Abyssal Eye,' inflicts an 'Imprison' effect that temporarily removes the front-most enemy hero from the battlefield, allowing players to disrupt the opponent's front line and create tactical variables in combat.

The special side story featuring Fumir, 'Show Me Even the Hidden Depths,' will run for six weeks until August 6. In addition to Fumir, the story features characters such as the information broker 'Birgitta' and her assistant 'Orb,' unfolding an adventure set against a coastal backdrop.

Players can also enjoy a minigame during the story. The minigame is designed in the style of the classic arcade 'territory-claiming' game, and players can earn rewards, including illustrations, by participating.

The 'Epic Dash' event, designed to support hero acquisition and growth, runs from June 25 to August 27. Players can complete daily or weekly missions to increase their 'Mission Pass' rank and earn rewards. These rewards include a fully leveled 5-star hero selector, a 5-star limited hero selector, a standard 5-star hero selector, summoning resources, and equipment sets.

A 'Special Moonlight Summon' event is also being held as part of Epic Dash. Players can receive up to 100 free Moonlight hero summons just by logging in daily. Additionally, players receive a 5-star Light-element hero summon card after 20 summons, and a 5-star Dark-element hero summon card after 100 summons.

Furthermore, the 'Lucky Dash' event, which provides equipment and enhancement stones, and the 'Epic Dash Buff' event, which offers gameplay-enhancing effects, are also underway.

More detailed information about 'Epic Seven' can be found on the official community and official YouTube channel.

Victor Wembanyama is one epic Game 7 win away from cementing superstar status
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs forced a decisive Game 7 against the Oklahoma City Thunder, and a lot is at stake for both the Spurs and superstar Victor Wembanyama.
items.content:
Share on X Share on Reddit Copy Article Add us as a preferred source Victor Wembanyama | Alonzo Adams-Imagn Images It's official, the San Antonio Spurs have forced a decisive Game 7 in the Western Conference Finals against the Oklahoma City Thunder. I shouldn't have to tell you all what is at stake for both the Spurs and superstar Victor Wembanyama.

It's official, the San Antonio Spurs have forced a decisive Game 7 in the Western Conference Finals against the Oklahoma City Thunder. I shouldn't have to tell you all what is at stake for both the Spurs and superstar Victor Wembanyama.

If they win, then they will have knocked off the defending champions and defeated their rivals. If they lose, then it's back to the drawing board this summer, tweaking their roster until they can beat OKC.

But what about Wembanyama? A win means that he would have arrived as the NBA's best player. If he loses, then he'll have to endure a summer of questions about his disappearing act in losses to the Thunder.

Just the fact the Spurs were able to force Game 7 is an accomplishment after they practically no-showed in Game 5. This team has some fight, and win or lose, taking the defending champions to seven games in the Western Conference Finals in their first playoff trip ain't nothing.

For a team that critics discounted for their lack of playoff experience, racking up at least 18 games of postseason experience in their first run together is impressive. It could also be important to their long-term development.

Stephon Castle has made big strides this season, and having played 85 games in his sophomore year has given him plenty of reps. The same can be said for Dylan Harper.

He could break out next season with the amount of experience he's gained. Still, the Spurs are hoping for more basketball, not just consolation prizes. Those two, along with Wembanyama, hold the key to San Antonio's Game 7 hopes.

Wembanyama's play during wins and losses in this series has been night and day. During wins, he plays like the best player in the NBA.

During losses, he looks gassed and uninvolved . The Spurs obviously hope for the former to happen in Game 7. A monster game and a win would go a long way towards Wembanyama's legacy and status as the future face of the NBA.

With him sitting out during the entire fourth quarter of Game 6, he will hopefully be rested and ready for the biggest game of his life so far. San Antonio needs him to be every bit as good as he was in Game 1 for the Silver and Black to achieve a massive Game 7 win.

items.title: Epic Seven Releases New Shepherd of the Dark Diene Update
items.summary: Epic Seven has released a brand-new Moonlight Hero, Shepherd of the Dark Diene, along with additional content in the latest update
items.content:
Posted in: Games , Mobile Games , Video Games | Tagged: Epic Seven , Smilegate , Super Creative

Epic Seven has released a brand-new Moonlight Hero, Shepherd of the Dark Diene, along with additional content in the latest update

Smilegate and developer Super Creative has launched a new update for Epic Seven , bringing with it a new character. Players now have access to Shepherd of the Dark Diene, a new Moonlight Hero who brings a different set of attacks and more to the fray, along with a New Year's event to kick off 2026. We have more details here as the content is live today.

Shepherd of the Dark Diene is a country girl who, after encountering a black wolf in the forest, forms a contract with Noias, the Dark Spirit Lord, who has appeared for the first time in centuries. Driven by her admiration for the Hero "Aki" and her unwavering determination, she embarks on her journey to save the world. But as her journey unfolds, it begins to transform into something dark and twisted. She is a 5★ Dark elemental Mage Hero who can lead battles to her advantage by utilizing various effects that trigger when she is granted "immortality." Her Skill 1, "Crimson Claws," inflicts rupture on the enemy, and a successful attack always results in a critical hit. Damage dealt increases proportionally to the caster's max Health. When the caster is granted immortality, it triggers a Dual Attack from the ally with the highest Attack.

Her Skill 2, "Noias's Guidance," grants immortality for 1 turn at the start of battle. Additionally, when someone uses a Soulburn, dispels all debuffs from the caster before activating "Dark Moon," which dispels buffs from all enemies, grants immortality to the caster for 3 turns, and increases Combat Readiness by 35%. Her Skill 3, "Endless Darkness," inflicts seal on all enemies for 2 turns, and attacks them before decreasing Combat Readiness by 30%. Also, a successful attack always results in a critical hit. When the caster is granted immortality, they ignore Effect Resistance.

To celebrate the New Year, Smilegate will also be running several in-game events. First, the "New Year Check-In Event" will run for three weeks until the 22nd. Players can log in to receive a New Year's greeting from Merurin. The New Year's Gift Chest includes Lv. 88 Equipment and "Fire Horse Stamps," which can be used in concurrent events. The second event, "Collect New Year Stamps," will run during the same period. By consuming Energy daily, players can obtain "Leif" and the event currency, "Fire Horse Stamps." In the third event, "New Year's Gift Arrived!," players can use the "Fire Horse Stamps" earned from the two events mentioned earlier to open random chests containing rewards such as MolaGora and Charms. Finally, in the "Merurin's Lucky Pouch" event, players can clear simple missions to earn various rewards, including a final reward of 1,000 Skystone.

items.title: LA Dodgers retain World Series after thrilling Game 7 win over Toronto Blue Jays
items.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have retained the World Series title after clinching victory over the Toronto Blue Jays in extra innings
items.content:
Yoshinobu Yamamoto is mobbed by his teammates after securing the World Series for the Dodgers. Photograph: Patrick Smith/Getty Images View image in fullscreen Yoshinobu Yamamoto is mobbed by his teammates after securing the World Series for the Dodgers. Photograph: Patrick Smith/Getty Images World Series This article is more than 7 months old LA Dodgers retain World Series after thrilling Game 7 win over Toronto Blue Jays This article is more than 7 months old Game 7: LA Dodgers 5–4 Toronto Blue Jays

Will Smith’s 11th-inning home run proves decisive

Dodgers becomes first repeat champion since 2000

As it happened: Bryan Graham’s inning-by-inning report

In pictures: Fans around world react to Dodgers’ epic win

Prefer the Guardian on Google The Los Angeles Dodgers won their second consecutive title in stunning fashion in the early hours of Sunday morning, depriving the Toronto Blue Jays of a first World Series in 32 years in a stomach-churning, epic Game 7. Will Smith’s solo home run with two outs at the top of the 11th inning off Shane Bieber gave LA a 5-4 lead before Yoshinobu Yamamoto, pitching in relief just a day after throwing 96 pitches, got Alejandro Kirk to ground out into a World Series-ending double play, bringing a ninth title to the Dodgers organization.

“Man, they’re a special group of guys,” Smith said after the game. “We just never gave up, kept fighting, pitching our asses off, hitting, taking great at-bats. Finally punched through there. Man, that was a fight for seven games. That’s a really good Toronto Blue Jays team. I’m just excited. There’s nothing better than this.”

Fri 24 Oct Game 1: Toronto Blue Jays 11, LA Dodgers 4

Sat 25 Oct Game 2: LA Dodgers 5, Toronto Blue Jays 1

Mon 27 Oct Game 3: LA Dodgers 6, Toronto Blue Jays 5 (18 innings)

Tue 28 Oct Game 4: Toronto Blue Jays 6, LA Dodgers 2

Wed 29 Oct Game 5: Toronto Blue Jays 6, LA Dodgers 1

Fri 31 Oct Game 6: LA Dodgers 3, Toronto Blue Jays 1

Sat 1 Nov Game 7: LA Dodgers 5, Toronto Blue Jays 4 (11 innings)

items.title: Dodgers repeat as World Series champions after an epic 11-Inning Game 7 thriller of Blue Jays
items.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Toronto Blue Jays 5-4 in Game 7 to become the first team in 25 years to win consecutive World Series titles.
items.content:
Yoshinobu Yamamoto and Dave Robert talk about the Dodgers 2025 World Series win.

For 32 years, the Toronto Blue Jays waited for a night like this — a Game 7 under the lights, the city electric, the air trembling with belief. And when it finally came on a brisk November Saturday, it unfolded like a fever dream. History dangled by a thread. Every pitch, every heartbeat, every sound of leather meeting wood felt like it could tilt the universe.

And when it was over — when Yoshinobu Yamamoto snapped off one final splitter, when Vladimir Guerrero Jr.’s knees buckled and the Dodgers spilled out of the dugout in a tidal wave of blue — it was the Los Angeles Dodgers who stood atop the baseball world once again.

Stream Los Angeles News for free, 24/7, wherever you are.

Trailing by three runs early in the game, the Los Angeles Dodgers mounted a comeback for the ages, defeating the Toronto Blue Jays 5-4 in extra innings of Game 7 of the 2025 World Series , crowning the Dodgers as the first back-to-back champions since the Yankees of 1998-2000.

But this one — this one might be remembered forever.

"This was one of the greatest games I've ever been a part of," said a champagne-soaked Dodgers' manager Dave Roberts after the game. "We've just done something that hasn't been done in decades."

But before the celebration in Los Angeles, before the heartbreak in Toronto, before the pandemonium and chaos, there was Bo Bichette.

In the bottom of the third, with one swing, he turned Toronto’s hope into thunder. Shohei Ohtani, running on fumes and three days’ rest, hung a splitter that spun in the cold light like a balloon, and Bichette crushed it 443 feet into the second deck. Three runs. Three decades of frustration exhaled in a single, defiant roar.

BO BICHETTE BELTS ONE TO DEEP CENTER 🤯 @BLUEJAYS LEAD 3-0 IN GAME 7 pic.twitter.com/64ai0Udfyl

The Rogers Centre shook like a pressure cooker coming to a boil — the roof quivering, the crowd delirious. Canada believed again.

"That was right up there with George's [Springer] homer against Seattle. He went dead center on the first pitch, it was just so fitting," said Blue Jays manager John Schneider of Bichette's big homer. "What Bo did this year is nothing short of amazing. In that moment, it felt right."

Ohtani, the global icon, looked human — mortal under the weight of the moment . His night ended in the third, three runs down, head bowed, his eyes tracing the ground as Dave Roberts made the walk to get him. The Jays had seized control, and for the first time, the Dodgers looked rattled.

"Shohei has the weight of the world on his shoulders when it comes to expectations," said Roberts of his superstar. "He's the face of baseball, and he's going to be the MVP in the National League. It's really special what he's done. He's a great person and a great competitor. He just didn't have it tonight."

items.title: Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 attracts 61% more viewers than 2024
items.summary: The Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 drew 61% more viewers than last year, peaking at over 28,000. With expanded coverage, global co-casters, and thrilling matches, this year’s event became one of the most-watched tournaments in Epic Seven history
items.content:
On September 6, the Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 concluded at the YES 24 Live Hall in Seoul, South Korea. Thanks to a combination of factors, which we'll get into in detail below, it ended among the three most popular competitions in the game's history.

The most prestigious event in Epic Seven's calendar carried a prize pool of $100,000, the joint-most in the mobile role-playing title's competitive history. It brought together 64 of the world's best players as they vied for the title of world champion.

Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 – basic viewership stats and top channels

After around three weeks of action, Xiao Xuenai beat GOMEAWME 4:2 in the Grand Final to emerge as the victor and the title's newest world champ. For this achievement, he took home $50,000 and some special items, including a trophy, a Hero Skin, and a ring, with another reward to be revealed at the end of the year.

"After six years in Epic Seven, I've finally made it to the top of RTA. Standing at the bottom and looking up at that peak felt overwhelming, but I was blessed to have true companions by my side throughout this journey. I want to thank Smilegate from the bottom of my heart for hosting the 2025 World Championship, and I'm deeply grateful to my Shadow Council members — Hazamarei, Keith, Second, and everyone else — for all their support along the way. I'm so proud that I could make our shared dream come true by bringing this championship home to the Council. My sincere thanks also go to the Ps streaming community, Blue Sky, and everyone who stood behind me. I hope all the Heirs find their true friendships and passion within the world of Epic Seven."

- Xiao Xuenai, after clinching the Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025

The Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 peaked at 28,315 Peak Viewers on the first day of the event: August 16. On this day, the second installment of the Epic Seven 7th Anniversary Showcase was released , revealing updates for the second half of the year and including insights from the development team about future developments for the mobile RPG.

This helped it comfortably beat the concurrent viewers mark set at the Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2024 by 61%. It also ended in the third spot when looking at the most popular tournaments in the title's esports history, sitting behind the 2022 and 2023 editions.

Comparing the viewership statistics of the last two E7 World Arena Championships

One big reason for this massive jump from 2024 was the number of channels covering the event. It shot up from 33 to 84 this year, helped by an increased interest shown by a lot of community streamers, which also meant that two extra platforms covered the action in 2025: CHZZK and Kick.

What is heartening is the fact that many Western co-casters jumped at the chance to livestream the games and finished among the top channels list . Considering that Epic Seven is a niche game with a core market in Korea, the fact that Spanish and Portuguese-speaking content creators showed high interest helped take the title and its coveted competition to a lot of new viewers .

With a format that included multiple qualifiers and a main event in a double round robin leading into quarterfinals, semifinals, and a best-of-seven grand final, the Epic Seven World Arena Championship 2025 also finished as the game's second-most-watched competition ever. Only the 2022 iteration is ahead by this metric.

Epic Seven has joined a list of games boasting a more regional presence, like Honor of Kings, in seeking to expand its audience base recently . Making its most prestigious tournaments more visible and accessible via co-casters and broadcasting in more languages has paid dividends for the 2025 World Arena Championship, which easily outperformed last year's edition and put up some of the title's best livestreaming numbers.

As more and more such games adopt this method, it will be interesting to see how their livestreaming numbers hold up in the coming years. Esports Charts will continue to monitor tournaments across genres and tiers , and readers interested in detailed stats for such competitions can check out our Events Dashboard .
